channel.title: GitHub Markdown Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Markdown in GitHub

item.title: labuladong/fucking-algorithm
item.description: 刷算法全靠套路，认准 labuladong 就够了！English version supported! Crack LeetCode, not only how, but also why.

item.title: jaywcjlove/linux-command
item.description: Linux命令大全搜索工具，内容包含Linux命令手册、详解、学习、搜集。https://git.io/linux

item.title: mdn/translated-content
item.description: The source repository of all translated content for MDN Web Docs

item.title: SAP/styleguides
item.description: This repository provides SAP style guides for coding and coding-related topics.

item.title: swiftlang/swift-evolution
item.description: This maintains proposals for changes and user-visible enhancements to the Swift Programming Language.

item.title: alexandresanlim/Badges4-README.md-Profile
item.description: Improve your README.md profile with these amazing badges.

item.title: walkccc/CLRS
item.description: 📚 Solutions to Introduction to Algorithms Third Edition

item.title: drknzz/GitHub-Achievements
item.description: 🔥 A Complete List of GitHub Profile Badges and Achievements 🔥

item.title: ethereum/ethereum-org-website
item.description: Ethereum.org is a primary online resource for the Ethereum community.

item.title: adambard/learnxinyminutes-docs
item.description: Code documentation written as code! How novel and totally my idea!
